narrative: A Staff Machine Learning Engineer with 9 years of experience at Salesforce, this candidate is ranked #1 due to their exceptional JD-relevant skill match for our Senior AI/ML Engineer role. Their deep expertise in Search Backend, LoRA, Search & Discovery, and Information Retrieval Systems directly aligns with our Search & Retrieval focus. With strong experience level alignment and a background at a product-first company, they are a top contender. The main caveat is their current location in Coimbatore, requiring relocation to Pune/Noida, and an unknown notice period.
